message:
fix: subagent working_dir shares parent env PID tracking (GAP-7.06)

Change runningPIDs from sync.Map value to *sync.Map pointer so it can
be shared between parent and child environments. Add
WithWorkingDirectory() method that creates a child env with a different
root but shared PID tracking. spawnAgent now uses this method instead
of creating an entirely new LocalExecutionEnvironment.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
